title: CandleSMP
description: A cool SMP plugin about candles
body:
This plugin is based on candles, the item that is usless in minecraft.
But with this plugin you can get a use for them and have fun.


There are 6 candles: flickering_ember, soothing_light, shadow_whisper, warping_wax, kinetic_flash and the crystalline_shield.

They all have special abilities to discover!

### Commands:
- /candlesmp     → main plugin command
- /candlesmp reload     → reloads the config file
- /candlesmp give <all|candle> <all|player>     → gives the candles
- /candlesmp cooldown     → resets the cooldown of the ability
- /drain     → drains your currect candle
- /ability     → use your ability

Dont forget to use the ressource pack for a better experience: [Ressource-pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/candlesmp-texturepack)
